name: Chicken with Chic Peas and Apricots.
recipeIngredient: 4 large chicken breasts, cut into three pieces each
25 cm (1 inch) piece of fresh ginger root, peeled and finely chopped
100 grams (4 oz) dried no-sol water apricots
400 grams (14 oz) canned chic peas, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a large non-porous bowl.
2. Put the chili, cinnamon, cumin, cardamom pods, and cloves into a spice grinder and grind as fine as possible.
3. Rub half the spice mixture into the chicken with half the ginger and garlic. Set aside for at least one hour.
4. Cook the apricots in the water until tender. Leave to cool in the pan.
5. Heat a wok.
6. Add the oil and cook the onion for 7 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Stir in the remaining ginger and garlic and cook for an additional minute.
8. Remove the onion mixture.
9. Add the chicken and cook for 3 minutes until lightly cooked.
10. Add the remaining spice mixture and onion mixture and cook for another 2 minutes.
11. Stir in the tomato puree, vinegar, sugar, chic peas, and apricots with the cooking juice.
12. Cook for 15 minutes and serve.
VARIATIONS
Use 450 G (1 lb) leg of lamb chops instead of chicken. Cook for 30 minutes instead of 15 minutes at the end of cooking.
Alternatively, for the spices mix together a pinch of chili powder, 2.5 mL (0.5 tsp) ground cinnamon, 5 mL (1 tsp) ground cumin, 2.5 mL (0.5 tsp) garam masala.

1339 kj
